info.title: Railmail Public API
info.description:
REST API for managing the Railmail email marketing platform programmatically.

## Authentication
Every request must carry a project-scoped API key, either in the `X-API-Key` header or as `Authorization: Bearer rm_...`. Keys have the format `rm_(live|test)_<random>`. A key resolves to exactly one project; all reads and writes are automatically isolated to that project and its tenant. A key cannot read or modify another project's data.

## Scopes
Every key carries a set of scopes. Each operation requires a specific scope, documented in that operation's description (for example `Requires scope: subscribers:write`). A request whose key lacks the required scope returns `403`.

The full scope taxonomy: `subscribers:read|write`, `topics:read|write`, `segments:read|write`, `campaigns:read|write`, `automations:read|write`, `custom_fields:read|write`, `sending_domains:read|write`, `consents:manage`, `suppressions:manage`, `reports:read`, `billing:read`, `credits:read`.

## Rate limiting
Requests are limited to 60 per minute per key. The response carries `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining` and `X-RateLimit-Reset`. When exceeded, the API returns `429` with a `Retry-After` header.

## Errors
All errors use RFC 7807 `application/problem+json` with `type`, `title`, `status`, `detail`, `instance`, `timestamp` and (for validation) `errors`.

## Canonical flow: add your users to your topics
1. `GET /topics` to discover topic keys.
2. `POST /subscribers` with `topicKeys` + `consent` to create a subscriber and subscribe in one call, OR `POST /subscribers/{email}/consents` to subscribe an existing subscriber.
If a topic uses double opt-in, the consent is created `PENDING_CONFIRMATION` and the subscriber must confirm via the email they receive before they are subscribed.

tags.name: Subscribers
tags.description: Manage subscribers within the API key's project

tags.name: Topics
tags.description: Manage subscription topics in the project

tags.name: Consents
tags.description: Grant, read and revoke per-topic consent for a subscriber

tags.name: Campaigns
tags.description: Create, manage, schedule and send email campaigns

tags.name: Segments
tags.description: Create, manage and populate subscriber segments

tags.name: Custom Fields
tags.description: Define and manage subscriber custom field definitions

tags.name: Automations
tags.description: Create, manage and control email automation workflows

tags.name: Sending Domain
tags.description: Manage the project's custom sending domain and DNS verification

tags.name: Campaign Reports
tags.description: Read campaign statistics, AI report, timeline and CSV export

tags.name: Billing
tags.description: Read subscription, plans, invoices and usage for the account

tags.name: AI Credits
tags.description: Read AI credit balance and transaction history for the account

tags.name: Project
tags.description: Read the project the API key is scoped to

post.description: Creates a subscriber in the key's project and subscribes them to the given topics in a single call. If a topic uses double opt-in, the resulting consent is `PENDING_CONFIRMATION`. Requires scope: `subscribers:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

addUserToTopics.summary: Add a customer's user to topics with consent

consent.consentText: I agree to receive product updates

get.description: Lists subscribers in the project, newest first. Requires scope: `subscribers:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.
Requires scope: `subscribers:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project; an email from another project returns 404.

patch.description: Updates name, phone and custom fields. Requires scope: `subscribers:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

delete.description: Requires scope: `subscribers:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

get.description: Lists subscription topics in the project. Requires scope: `topics:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

discoverTopics.summary: Discover topic keys before subscribing users

post.description: Requires scope: `topics:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

get.description: Requires scope: `topics:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project; a key from another project returns 404.

patch.description: Requires scope: `topics:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

delete.description: Requires scope: `topics:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

post.description: Subscribes an existing subscriber to a topic. If the topic uses double opt-in, the consent is created `PENDING_CONFIRMATION` (`requiresConfirmation: true`) and the subscriber must confirm via email before they are subscribed. Requires scope: `consents:manage`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

subscribeExisting.summary: Add an existing subscriber to a topic

value.consentText: I agree to receive the newsletter

201.description: Consent granted (or pending confirmation for double opt-in topics)

get.description: Returns per-topic consent status and whether the subscriber is globally suppressed. Requires scope: `consents:manage`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

delete.description: Unsubscribes the subscriber from a single topic (not a global unsubscribe). Requires scope: `consents:manage`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

post.summary: Add an email to the suppression list
post.description: Suppresses an email so it can no longer receive any mail. Requires scope: `suppressions:manage`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

get.summary: Check whether an email is suppressed
get.description: Requires scope: `suppressions:manage`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

delete.summary: Remove an email from the suppression list
delete.description: Removing a global unsubscribe is irreversible-sensitive, so it requires the confirmation header `X-Confirm-Unsuppress: true`. Requires scope: `suppressions:manage`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

parameters.name: X-Confirm-Unsuppress
parameters.description: Must be the literal string `true` to confirm the removal.

get.description: Lists campaigns in the project, newest first. Requires scope: `campaigns:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

post.description: Creates a draft campaign. Requires scope: `campaigns:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

get.description: Requires scope: `campaigns:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project; a key from another project returns 404.

patch.description: Updates campaign metadata and content. Requires scope: `campaigns:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

delete.description: Requires scope: `campaigns:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

post.description: Transitions the campaign to `SCHEDULED`. The campaign must define a `scheduledAt`. Requires scope: `campaigns:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

Queues the campaign for immediate sending (`QUEUED_FOR_SENDING`). Pre-send guards in the platform may reject the transition. Requires scope: `campaigns:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

get.description: Lists segments in the project, newest first. Requires scope: `segments:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

post.description: Requires scope: `segments:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

get.description: Requires scope: `segments:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project; an id from another project returns 404.

patch.description: Requires scope: `segments:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

delete.description: Requires scope: `segments:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

get.description: Requires scope: `segments:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

post.description: Adds subscribers (by id) to a static segment. Requires scope: `segments:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

delete.description: Removes subscribers (by id) from a static segment. Requires scope: `segments:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

get.description: Lists active custom field definitions in the project. Requires scope: `custom_fields:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

post.description: Creates a custom field definition. SELECT and MULTI_SELECT require `options`. Requires scope: `custom_fields:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

get.summary: Get a custom field by key
get.description: Requires scope: `custom_fields:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

delete.description: Archives (soft-deletes) the custom field. Requires scope: `custom_fields:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

patch.description: Updates display name, description and required flag. Requires scope: `custom_fields:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.
Updates the field's config (e.g. SELECT options) and default value. Requires scope: `custom_fields:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

get.description: Lists automations in the project, newest first. Requires scope: `automations:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

post.description: Requires scope: `automations:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

get.description: Requires scope: `automations:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project; an id from another project returns 404.

patch.description: Updates name, description, trigger and status. Requires scope: `automations:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

delete.description: Requires scope: `automations:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

patch.description: Replaces the automation graph nodes and edges. Requires scope: `automations:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

post.description: Transitions the automation to `ACTIVE`. Requires scope: `automations:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.
Transitions the automation to `PAUSED`. Requires scope: `automations:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

get.description: Each project has at most one custom sending domain. Requires scope: `sending_domains:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

post.summary: Set up a custom sending domain
post.description: Sets up a custom sending domain for the project. Requires scope: `sending_domains:write`. Tenancy: the tenant is taken from the API key context, never the body.

patch.description: Updates the custom sending domain name. Requires scope: `sending_domains:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

delete.description: Requires scope: `sending_domains:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

get.description: Returns the DNS records that must be added to verify the domain. Requires scope: `sending_domains:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

post.description: Triggers a DNS verification check and returns the resulting status. Requires scope: `sending_domains:write`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

get.description: Returns the generated AI report and its content for a campaign. Requires scope: `reports:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.
Returns live delivery and engagement statistics. Requires scope: `reports:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.
Returns a time series of delivery and engagement counts. Requires scope: `reports:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.
Returns the campaign statistics as a CSV file. Requires scope: `reports:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.
Returns the subscription for the account that owns this key's tenant. Requires scope: `billing:read`. Tenancy: resolved from the API key's tenant to its organization.
Returns the plans available to the account. Requires scope: `billing:read`. Tenancy: resolved from the API key's tenant to its organization.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: ISO currency code used to price plan variants.

get.description: Returns the account's invoices, paginated. Requires scope: `billing:read`. Tenancy: resolved from the API key's tenant to its organization.
Returns current usage versus plan limits. Requires scope: `billing:read`. Tenancy: resolved from the API key's tenant to its organization.
Requires scope: `credits:read`. Tenancy: resolved from the API key's tenant to its organization.
Returns the account's credit transactions, paginated. Requires scope: `credits:read`. Tenancy: resolved from the API key's tenant to its organization.
Returns the project the API key is scoped to. Project creation and deletion are not exposed over the public API. Requires scope: `projects:read`. Tenancy: scoped to the API key's project.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Project-scoped API key, format rm_(live|test)_... . May also be sent as `Authorization: Bearer rm_...`.

SizeParam.name: size
SizeParam.description: Page size, clamped to a maximum of 100.

BadRequest.description: Malformed request or invalid field values.

Forbidden.description: The API key lacks the required scope.

NotFound.description: The resource does not exist in this project.

Conflict.description: The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

UnprocessableEntity.description: The request body failed domain validation.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Epoch seconds when the window resets.

ConsentResponse.description: When requiresConfirmation is true, the topic uses double opt-in and the subscriber must confirm via email before they are subscribed.

contentJson.description: Rich text content as a JSON string.

rules.description: JSON rules definition for DYNAMIC segments.

nodes.description: Automation graph nodes as a JSON string.

edges.description: Automation graph edges as a JSON string.
